title: RBI publishes Payment System Report, December 2025
description: The Reserve Bank has today published the half-yearly Payment System Report, December 2025. This report, in addition to analysing the trends in payment transactions carried out using various payment systems in India during the last five calendar years up to the second half of the calendar year 2025, covers major recent regulatory developments in the domestic payments ecosystem. The role of Central Counterparties (CCPs), in strengthening India’s financial stability by mitigating counterparty
